title: Table
description: A responsive table for displaying tabular data.

manual.title: Add utility function
manual.description: Create a cn utility function if you don't have one already.

usage.import: import { Table, TableBody, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from '@repo/components';

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
import { Table, TableBody, TableCaption, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from "@repo/components"; export default function TableDemo() { return ( Recent invoices. Invoice Status Amount INV001 Paid $250.00 INV002 Pending $150.00
); }

examples.title: Extended
examples.description: A table with more rows, a method column, and a footer.

examples.title: RTL
examples.description: To enable RTL support in shadcn/ui, see the RTL configuration guide.
